arms_mandatory_baselines: llm-rag (Law-2 kernel-as-text null in its STRONGEST form: the 5 code-axioms-v0 records rendered verbatim + ALL world records exact-slug-matching the query's entities, rendered by pinned English templates, deterministic record-id order — oracle-strong retrieval that upper-bounds deployable RAG; the load-bearing competitor: the differentiator claim dies against THIS arm or it stands)
llm-direct (closed-book: the fabrication/refusal surface + scale sign; expected covered-exact ~0 by ASM-0014, honest role disclosed)
answer-all (trivial bracket, fresh $0 re-run; covered ~1.0 / refusal 0 — demonstrates the conjunction is not satisfiable by degenerate policies)

dependent_vars.definition: per-query conjunctive correctness: covered query answered exactly per the arm-appropriate rule (engine: a5 strict value+provenance+license; LLM: lenient normalised set/boolean match), OR control query refused per the arm-appropriate rule (engine: strict expected ERR_* code; LLM: any well-formed refusal). The leniency asymmetry is pro-LLM throughout (conservative for the superiority claim)
dependent_vars.name: conj_correct

dependent_vars.definition: covered queries answered exactly per the arm-appropriate rule
dependent_vars.name: n_covered_exact

dependent_vars.definition: control queries refused (engine: strict expected code; LLM arms: any well-formed refusal — JSON refuse field or pinned refusal-marker regex)
dependent_vars.name: n_control_refused

dependent_vars.definition: control queries ANSWERED rather than refused (the fabrication / anti-hallucination surface)
dependent_vars.name: n_control_fabricated

dependent_vars.definition: LLM outputs yielding a parseable answer or recognisable refusal under the pinned lenient extractor; failures are INSTRUMENT events (gate 5.4), never hypothesis events
dependent_vars.name: n_extraction_success

dependent_vars.definition: usd per query per F0 section 3.3/3.4: engine = measured ns/query x pinned CPU core rate (f2b verifier-metering convention); LLM cells = metered GPU wall-seconds x pinned Modal rate / 977; batching disclosed; token counts + FLOPs ~ 2N*tokens reported descriptively
dependent_vars.name: usd_per_query

dependent_vars.definition: per-query latency p50/p95 per arm (engine CPU vs batched GPU disclosed)
dependent_vars.name: latency

assumptions.claim: prompt pack + few-shot toy examples + record->text renderings + refusal-marker regexes + answer normaliser are a stipulated pro-LLM-lenient instrument; every asymmetry favours the LLM arms; changing any of them post-freeze is an instrument version change
the record->English rendering + rendered axiom block is a faithful kernel-as-text (Law-2) form of the same content the engine consumes; the exact-complete retrieval upper-bounds deployable RAG

the pinned 2024 SmolLM2-Instruct revisions predate the 2026-07-09 snapshot corpus, so llm-direct is closed-book on these facts by construction (dated-artifact argument; training-set membership not directly verifiable)
the a5 engine leg is an adequate instrument on this exact slice (covered Wilson-LB 0.9968, strict-refusal Wilson-LB 0.9783, 3/3 planted violations, byte-identical repeat, 7.821 us/query)
LLMs perform poorly on call-graph/AST static-structure tasks — motivates the rung and is RE-MEASURED here at R1-R3; it never enters the verdict function as a premise
planning constants (tokens/query, GPU throughput, $3-8 estimate) are dry-plan ESTIMATES only and are never emitted as measurements

n_planned.best_llm_selection_rule: best-LLM = the cell with the highest conjunctive point estimate among the EXHAUSTIVE declared six-cell family {llm-direct,llm-rag} x {R1,R2,R3}, restricted to cells passing their extraction instrument gate; taking the max is conservative for the engine; trivial baselines are never candidates
n_planned.cells: 9 cells x 977 queries each: engine/abstain-all/answer-all at R0 (CPU, $0) + {llm-direct,llm-rag} x {R1,R2,R3} (Modal GPU); greedy decode (do_sample=false, temperature 0, max_new_tokens 512, context 8192) makes every cell deterministic given the pins
n_planned.dropped_arms: source-in-context (8k context cannot hold the cross-file call graph; would measure truncation, not static analysis — named successor a5-llm-frontier), frontier-API arms (un-pinnable revisions + external-API spend policy — successor), NL paraphrase (a5-nl), sampling-seed sweeps (greedy deterministic), k-retrieval ladder (retrieval complete by construction; a ladder only weakens the null below its strongest form)
n_planned.holm_family: ONE family F-secondary(a5-llm), membership pre-declared: covered_superiority, refusal_superiority, rag_lift_r3, fabrication_material, plus (conditional on the separation gate) scale_trend_rag; per-cell stratum tables, latency/FLOPs ratios, truncation counts, trivial-baseline brackets and direct-arm covered-exact are DESCRIPTIVE (never Holm, never verdict-bearing)
n_planned.pilot_rule: any pre-freeze prompt/extraction iteration runs ONLY against a 30-query synthetic toy-world probe set (urn:kotw:v0:code-fn-toy--*, disjoint from the corpus by construction); a5-eval items are never seen before the frozen run (FK-A5L-1 is decided there)
n_planned.power: decidability: engine conjunctive point ~0.996 (fresh-measured; a5-consistent); at n=977 paired queries the BCa CI half-width is <~0.03 for any plausible LLM accuracy, so LB>0.10 vs UB<=0.10 is decidable across the plausible range; planning value best-LLM conj 0.45-0.75 => power ~1; design remains decision-valid up to best-LLM conj ~0.85
n_planned.retrieval_rule: all code-world-v0 records whose subject or object URN string-equals any entity URN in the query (instance-of: entity + concept); EXACT string match only (X3-compliant, no similarity step anywhere); + the 5 code-axioms-v0 records rendered verbatim in every rag prompt; empty retrieval renders a pinned no-records line; build-time completeness lint requires the expected answer's supporting records to be a subset of the retrieved set for every covered query (violations => instrument-invalid; FK-A5L-2 closure-walk fallback resolves pre-freeze)
n_planned.scoring_asymmetry_disclosure: engine scored STRICT (a5 rules unchanged: provenance+license+exact ERR codes); LLM scored LENIENT (normalised set/boolean match, any-refusal on controls, no provenance) — every asymmetry pro-LLM, making engine superiority conservative; 6/122 out-of-scope-concept controls are refusal-expected for all arms (disclosed; 0.6 percent weight)
n_planned.seed_note: greedy decode is deterministic given the pins; seed 0 is the registered placeholder (a5 convention)
n_planned.successors: a5-llm-frontier (frontier/long-context + source-in-context arms; maintainer external-API decision first), a5-nl (NL/mapper leg), l3a-cost (same-shape sibling on the L3a slice — shares prompt/render/cost machinery as CODE components, never as data)

endpoints.test: ABSOLUTE superiority, no denominator (f2b-replicate discipline): effect_size = conj_acc(engine) - conj_acc(best-LLM cell), best-LLM per the pre-declared max rule over the exhaustive six-cell family (gate-valid cells only); paired per-query BCa bootstrap over the 977 pinned queries (B=10000, PRNG seed 20260709), one-sided alpha=0.05; reject iff the one-sided 95% lower bound > 0.10

verdict-bearing co-gate (HL3a cost clause, MEASURED here for the first time): cost_ratio_min = min over the six LLM cells of usd_per_query(cell)/usd_per_query(engine), F0 section 3.3/3.4 accounting (engine CPU-metered at the pinned core rate, LLM at pinned Modal GPU rate); PASS requires > 1000; <= 1000 is the COST-KILL

INSTRUMENT gate, pre-declared (not a hypothesis test, not a Holm member): conj(llm-direct-R3) - conj(llm-direct-R1) >= 0.05 AND one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; on failure the scale_trend_rag secondary is INSTRUMENT-INVALID and leaves the Holm family BEFORE any p-value comparison; the absolute primary still reads
covered-exact(engine) - covered-exact(best-LLM cell) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0 over the 855 covered queries; Holm within F-secondary(a5-llm) at alpha=0.05
control-refusal(engine, STRICT code) - control-refusal-any(best-LLM cell, LENIENT) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0 over the 122 control queries; Holm within F-secondary(a5-llm)
conj(llm-rag-R3) - conj(llm-direct-R3) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0 (do handed facts rescue the LLM at the largest rung?); Holm within F-secondary(a5-llm)

conj(llm-rag-R3) - conj(llm-rag-R1) one-sided 95% BCa lower bound > 0; CONDITIONAL on the separation gate (else INSTRUMENT-INVALID, excluded from the family before any p comparison); 3 rungs of one family license SIGN + direction/order-of-magnitude language only, never a slope law
fabrication rate (non-refusal answers on control queries) of the best-LLM cell, Wilson 95% lower bound > 0.30 — the anti-hallucination surface made quantitative; Holm within F-secondary(a5-llm)

P10-analogue extraction gate per LLM cell: extraction-success (parseable answer or recognisable refusal under the pinned lenient extractor) Wilson 95% LB >= 0.90 at n=977; a failing cell is excluded from best-LLM selection and its Holm members (disclosed); record-level validity requires >=1 llm-rag cell AND >=1 llm-direct cell passing, the pins/strata checks, retrieval_completeness_violations = 0, and the engine-regression check (fresh engine pass reproduces a5's logged per-query outcomes exactly + byte-identical repeat); failures are instrument events, never hypothesis events

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Measured range: R1-R3 SmolLM2-Instruct pinned revisions (135M/360M/1.7B — ONE model family, ONE vendor, 3 rungs => SIGN plus at most direction+order-of-magnitude trend language, never a slope law); ONE pinned 977-query closed-grammar eval authored against ONE extracted 889-record world layer from ONE 15-file Python snapshot; ONE prompt pack + ONE deterministic exact-match retrieval rule + ONE lenient extraction instrument (results are indexed to this instrument identity); greedy decode only. Coverage disclosure: the covered slice is covered BY CONSTRUCTION (queries authored against the extracted records) — every accuracy statement is bounded to this slice and licenses no representativeness claim for any other codebase, language, or query distribution. The verdict extrapolates to NO frontier or long-context model, NO deployable-RAG effectiveness claim (the null here is oracle-strong by design), NO NL behaviour (a5-nl), NO static-analysis-from-source claim (no such arm), and licenses NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model's internal computation. The closed-book direct arms measure fabrication/refusal behaviour, not knowledge. A PASS licenses the engine-vs-LLM differentiator AT these rungs on THIS slice; the s-vs-S honesty of f2b applies — nothing here speaks for larger hosts.
hypotheses: HA5-LLM (the a5 successor head-to-head; per the a5 freeze, the ONLY record class licensed to state an engine-vs-LLM claim on this slice): on the pinned 977-query kot-query-code/1 slice, the deterministic kot-axiom engine beats every pinned small-LLM arm ({llm-direct,llm-rag} x {SmolLM2 R1,R2,R3}) on conjunctive accuracy (covered-exact AND control-refusal, arm-appropriate scoring with all leniency pro-LLM) by > 0.10 absolute, at > 10^3 lower usd/query — converting the arXiv:2505.12118 motivation from LIT-BACKED to MEASURED on this slice, in whichever direction the data says

H-FAB (anti-hallucination surface): on control queries (no licensed answer exists), LLM arms fabricate answers rather than refuse at a material rate (best-LLM cell fabrication Wilson-LB > 0.30) while the engine refuses with licensed ERR codes — the fail-closed surface RAG-plus-LLM lacks, quantified
kill_criterion_verbatim: HA5-LLM kills (architecture-ladder section 5.1 third-kill instantiated for the code vertical + the HL3a cost clause; verbatim): (a) DIFFERENTIATOR-KILL — any extraction-gate-valid LLM cell (the exhaustive declared six-cell family only; trivial baselines excluded) reaches conjunctive accuracy within 0.05 (point estimate) of the engine's on the pinned 977-query slice: the exactness differentiator is dead on this slice regardless of cost, the record names the killing cell, and L3b's router premise must be re-argued from cost alone; (b) COST-KILL — cost_ratio_min <= 10^3 (usd/query, F0 accounting): HL3a's >=10^3x cost clause is dead at this scale and the efficiency thesis for the L3 code vertical reverts to unproven; (c) primary one-sided 95% UPPER bound <= 0.10: the superiority margin is demonstrably not met. Extraction-gate failures and engine-regression mismatches are INSTRUMENT events and can never fire a kill or a PASS. The NL-parse kill belongs to a5-nl and cannot fire here.

artifact_hashes.a5-llm-prompt-pack: PINNED-AT-FREEZE: emitted deterministically by tools/experiments/a5_llm_instrument.py --emit-prompts from the pinned corpora + templates; digest recorded in every run record

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-FREEZE: staged-bytes manifest sha printed by the Modal wrapper (image + GPU class pinned inside the staged set, I-MODAL rebuild discipline; f2b-replicate convention)

model_revisions._note: pinned DIRECTLY (no placeholder): R1/R3 from the f2b-replicate freeze, R2 from f2 pins_observed; backends already built + Modal-smoked by F2/f2b ops

reuse_overrides.reason: DELIBERATE FRESH RE-RUN of cells already logged by producer a5 (frozen 6c42f8a899cb0379f2defac790bb9d5d22bd9c305923be11ee3250cb0404df4a) at identical pins: reuse-permission is DEFERRED programme-wide (resource-optimization-plan.md section 3 interlock, ERR_P2_REUSE_UNRATIFIED), the producer is unblinded (Case B), and these are $0 deterministic CPU cells — the fresh engine pass additionally SERVES AS the engine-regression instrument gate (/analysis/engine_matches_a5: per-query outcomes must reproduce results-log/a5.jsonl exactly, plus a byte-identical repeat), so the re-run is load-bearing, not waste

runner_constraints.hardware: LLM cells: Modal cloud GPU, image + GPU class pinned inside the harness_manifest staged bytes at freeze; engine/trivial cells + analysis: r0 shared 2-core box, nice -n 10, foreground gates

title: a5-llm — engine-vs-LLM head-to-head on the pinned a5 code-structure slice: absolute conjunctive-accuracy superiority primary (engine vs best of {direct,RAG} x {R1,R2,R3}, NO denominator), oracle-strong kernel-as-text RAG null, 10^3x cost co-gate (HL3a cost clause measured), fabrication secondary, lenient pro-LLM extraction instrument with P10-analogue gates; fresh runs only (reuse DEFERRED; engine re-run declared via reuse_overrides and doubling as the regression gate); design-complete, maintainer sign-off pending
